description: Design-level state management patterns and anti-patterns

entries.title: Incomplete State Machine
entries.summary: Design describes some states and transitions but not all

indicators: State diagrams with ellipsis or incomplete transitions
No terminal state definitions or failure path transitions
design_context.description: The design describes some states and transitions but not all. Missing transitions mean undefined behavior — the implementation will fill gaps with whatever the developer assumes.

entries.title: No Recovery from Stuck States
entries.summary: No specification for recovery from unexpected states

indicators: Emergency modes with no exit criteria
design_context.description: The design doesn't specify how to recover when the system enters an unexpected state. Paused contracts with no unpause path, failed migrations with no rollback.

entries.title: Unbounded loop over user-controlled collection in value-sensitive path creates permanent DoS with all-or-nothing semantics
entries.summary: A value-sensitive operation loops through a user-controlled, unbounded collection. Combined with all-or-nothing semantics, exceeding the block gas limit permanently locks both the value and potentially the underlying assets.

indicators: Loop iterates over a per-user collection with no upper bound on size
No partial processing or pagination mechanism specified
All-or-nothing invariant prevents partial processing or withdrawals
Withdrawal/unstake triggers the same enumeration loop as the value claim path
Collection growth can happen organically (automated managers, normal usage)
design_context.description: When a design loops through all user positions/stakes in a value-sensitive path and enforces an all-or-nothing invariant, the user's collection size becomes a DoS vector. If the collection exceeds what can be processed in a single block's gas limit, the operation permanently reverts. The DoS is especially severe when withdrawal/unstake triggers the same enumeration loop, as it locks both accrued value AND the underlying principal with no recovery path.

entries.auditor_notes: Confirmed. Design acknowledged the risk in open questions but left unresolved. Principal locking escalates impact beyond value claim DoS.

confirmed_by.context: Confirmed in design review — unbounded position loop in concentrated liquidity component
